news.t: Leuthold Select Industries Fund Converts to ETF

holdings.infoBox: LST is an equity ETF with a total of 116 individual holdings. The top holdings are Flex Ltd. stock at 2.99%, Cisco Systems at 2.44%, Dell Technologies at 2.35%, Advanced Micro Devices at 2.26%, and Alphabet at 2.22%.

overview.description: The Leuthold Select Industries ETF (LST) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed, seeking capital appreciation by broadly investing in US equity securities. The selection process utilizes a quantitative approach that focuses on shifts in industry groups LST was launched on Jan 21, 2025 and is issued by Leuthold.

data.title: Leuthold Select Industries Fund Converts to ETF
data.text: MINNEAPOLIS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The Leuthold Group, a leading investment research and asset management firm, today announced the conversion of its Select Industries Fund to an exchange-traded fund struc...
